name: git-prune-branches-keep-main-release
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>act>verify>handoff | scope: refs(local,remote) | policy: allowlist-only,safety-first,deterministic-output | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote whose branches will be pruned. Default: origin.

display_name: Git / Prune Branches Keep Main Release
